_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 22:45 UTC tick — 15 news_flash events consumed (iran_ceasefire/hormuz_strait/us_iran_military — all rebroadcasts of known narrative, no fresh catalyst). MATERIAL MOVES vs 17:10 tick (5.5h ago): OIL 91.211 (+100p, +6.21% day, CLEAN break + sustained above 90.5 — escalation thesis confirmed, but alert trigger 90.5 now stale post-run). USDJPY 159.583 bid (+10p, broke day high 159.53, 41.7p below 160 intervention). AUDUSD 0.71348 (-187p, BROKE day low 0.71422, -0.58% day, 64.8p above 0.707 target — pressure building to buy zone). GOLD 4702.46 (-22p, BREAKING day low 4707.36, -2.45% day — market pricing DEAL despite Hormuz closed, conflicting with oil). USDCAD 1.36728 (+16p USD dominance over oil-CAD bid). EURUSD 1.17244 (-19p bear continuation). GBPUSD 1.34805 (-20p broke 1.348). USDCHF 0.78213 (+14p USD bid overwhelming CHF haven). BTCUSD 75,462 (-1.09%). DEADLINE CLARIFICATION: CNN/NPR/Al Jazeera Apr 21 confirm 'Wednesday evening ET' (likely Thu 00-04 GMT Apr 23) NOT 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22 as prior ticks assumed — T- ambiguous, may be ~25h not ~1h. Tape CONFLICTED: oil=escalation, gold=deal optimism, USD=dominance. MODIFY oil_crude_escalation_90 (trigger run through, reposition as 90.0-90.5 pullback-retest buy with 89 SL). MODIFY usdjpy + audusd (refresh prices + T-note). 9 structure_watch KEEP. 8 queries KEEP (all still topical for binary resolution window).

level_alerts.note: buy AUDUSD 0.707 support on ceasefire-fail spike — live 22:44 UTC 0.71348 (-187p vs prior 0.71535, broke day low 0.71422, 64.8p above zone). USD safe-haven bid broad (USDJPY/USDCAD/USDCHF all bull, EURUSD/GBPUSD bear) — AUD already softening pre-binary. Deadline ambiguity (0000 GMT Wed vs Wed eve ET per CNN/NPR) but tape treating as imminent. If ceasefire collapses, AUDUSD likely spikes to 0.707 for liquidity sweep. Wait for rejection wick on 0.707 touch; skip naked level hits.
level_alerts.proximity: 64.8p above 0.707 buy zone (live 22:44 UTC 0.71348 bid). Broke day low 0.71422 — pressure toward zone building. Binary T- ambiguous (0000 GMT Wed lit. reading vs Wed eve ET per CNN/NPR).

level_alerts.note: sell USDJPY 160.00 intervention red-line fade — live 22:44 UTC 159.583 bid (broke day high 159.53, +10p vs prior 159.485, 41.7p below 160). Japan intervened at 159.23 in Jan 2026; Katayama G7 'high urgency' verbal. USD broadly bid pre-binary (likely continues higher into event). Short ONLY on rejection wick at 160.00 — skip naked touches (intervention risk both ways).
level_alerts.proximity: 41.7p below 160.00 intervention red line (live 22:44 UTC 159.583 bid). Broke day high 159.53, trend bullish — tightening toward zone.

level_alerts.note: RENAMED + REARMED — prior 90.5 breakout trigger RAN THROUGH (live 22:44 UTC 91.211, +6.21% day, +70p past trigger). Reposition as pullback-retest BUY of 90.0-90.5 now-support zone. Thesis: broken resistance flipped to support, bullish structure intact (bull BOS 87.99, FVG 88.91-89.548 mitigated as prior support). Buy on cross_down back into 90.5 with M15 bull rejection wick AND no ceasefire-confirmed-proceed headline. SL 89.00 (below broken 90 psych), TP 93.00+ (run continuation). Conv 3 (tape confirms momentum but T- ambiguous binary cuts edge). SKIP if gold reverses higher (would imply safehaven bid rotating BACK into gold = oil deal-priced-out = bear).
level_alerts.proximity: 71.1p above 90.5 retest trigger (live 22:44 UTC 91.211 bid). Prior breakout trigger now flipped to pullback-buy. Wait for retest + rejection wick.
